2143330.name: The Color of Life
2143330.description:
Harness the power of creativity using your Magic Paintbrush to bring paintings of what you've seen to life in unique ways, in order to restore color to the Magic Rainbow which represents balance in your expansive world.

Explore endless and uniquely generated worlds that are waiting to be touched with some life! This game is full of freedom, but not without a goal in mind. Start off in a world full of potential, but one with enemies trying to steal all the color for themselves! The Magic Rainbow is what gives this world life and magic but it has been drained by these enemies. Put them in their place, bringing your paintings to life, and watch the Magic Rainbow become whole again!



Choose your path! In this Open World Survival experience, brute force your way out of safety to early on, or play the slow game and prepare yourself and discover what creations you can paint.

Main Features

  • Paint to Create: Paint the things you've seen to bring them to life and help you fight.
  • Infinite Worlds: Discover new unique features of your world as you play.
  • Co-op journey: play along side a group of friends
  • Evolving enemies: learn how to dismantle your foes.
  • Train your combative skills: create your own way of fighting.
  • Flexible play-style: play the game how you want.

You have the opportunity to make sure the world becomes as magical as it is can be.
2143330.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
